page: Microsoft Azure E64ads_v6 is an Eadv6-family virtual machine built on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 32 physical cores of an AMD EPYC 9V74 processor running at 3.7 GHz. The x86_64 architecture includes support for advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 (including AVX-512 VNNI and AVX-512 BF16), AES cryptography, and SHA extensions. The server is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. It also includes 3780 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable. No GPU accelerators are present.

In benchmark evaluations, the E64ads_v6 demonstrates strong compute and memory capabilities. Its single-core performance is rated in the top tier (top 10%) via stress-ng, while multi-core performance falls within the top 25%. Memory bandwidth tests show strong results (top 25%) for small-block cached reads and large-block uncached writes, though large-block uncached reads perform at an average level. The server excels in data processing tasks, achieving top-tier results in Geekbench multi-core execution and image processing, alongside strong performance in software compilation, ray tracing, and text processing.

With its high memory density and substantial local storage, the E64ads_v6 offers a resource-dense profile suitable for memory-intensive and database workloads. It achieves strong performance in Passmark database operations and Redis SET operations, processing 89.03 million operations per second. Additionally, it shows top-tier performance for small LLM inference tasks, though performance scales down to average levels for larger 70B models. This hardware configuration is well-suited for large-scale databases, memory-cached applications, data analytics, and enterprise workloads requiring high memory capacity and fast local storage without the need for dedicated GPU acceleration.
description: The Microsoft Azure E64ads_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 64 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC 9V74 processor running at 3.7 GHz. Built on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this x86_64 server is equipped with 512.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high 8.0 GB per vCPU ratio, and includes 3780 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability. Benchmark data highlights top-tier single-core CPU performance and multi-core Geekbench scores, alongside strong memory write bandwidth and database operations. The server is highly capable in data processing, showing strong results in Redis operations and software compilation. Lacking a GPU, it is designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, large-scale databases, and data analytics.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E64ads_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 64 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 512 GB of RAM, and 3780 GB of local storage, delivering top-tier single-core and database performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E64ads_v6 is a memory-optimized VM with 64 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and 3780 GB local storage for database and enterprise workloads.
tagline: A high-memory, storage-equipped virtual machine featuring sixty-four dedicated AMD EPYC cores for demanding database and data-processing workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated AMD EPYC 9V74 vCPUs running at 3.7 GHz
512 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per vCPU
3780 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier single-core CPU and multi-core Geekbench performance
Optimized for large-scale databases, Redis, and memory-intensive workloads
